heading: Availability of lines of credit and use
label: 12184 Availability of lines of credit and use
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13824 of Title 42

children.heading: Approval of application
children.label: a Approval of application
children.text: The Secretary shall provide a community development corporation that has an application approved under with a line of credit in an amount determined appropriate by the Secretary, subject to the limitations contained in subsection (b).section 12183 of this title

children.heading: Limitations on availability of amounts
children.label: b Limitations on availability of amounts

children.heading: Maximum amount
children.label: 1 Maximum amount
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide in excess of $2,000,000 in lines of credit under this subpart to a single applicant.

children.heading: Period of availability
children.label: 2 Period of availability
children.text: A line of credit provided under this subpart shall remain available over a period of time established by the Secretary, but in no event shall any such period of time be in excess of 3 years from the date on which such line of credit is made available.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding paragraphs (1) and (2), if a recipient of a line of credit under this subpart has made full and productive use of such line of credit, can demonstrate the need and demand for additional assistance, and can meet the requirements of , the amount of such line of credit may be increased by not more than $1,500,000.section 12182(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: Amounts drawn from line of credit
children.label: c Amounts drawn from line of credit
children.text: Amounts drawn from each line of credit under this subpart shall be used solely for the purposes described in and shall only be drawn down as needed to provide loans, investments, or to defray administrative costs related to the establishment of a revolving loan fund.section 12181 of this title

children.heading: Use of revolving loan funds
children.label: d Use of revolving loan funds
children.text: Revolving loan funds established with lines of credit provided under this subpart may be used to provide technical assistance to private business enterprises and to provide financial assistance in the form of loans, loan guarantees, interest reduction assistance, equity shares, and other such forms of assistance to business enterprises in target areas and who are in compliance with .section 12183(a)(4) of this title
